summary: Lead accepts M7-PLAYER-FIRST-SCREEN-ORIENTATION-001 after gameplay_designer R2 ACCEPT and full local integration verification. The task adds a first-screen Court Brief, player-facing objective/action guidance, neutral player-mode idle status, and regression coverage that prevents default player mode from exposing developer/debug/internal review text. Formal closure remains pending PR CI, merge, main sync, and CLOSED status update.

decisions: Proceed to PR/CI/merge with task status ACCEPTED, not CLOSED.
